name: Veggie Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the 1 can of red kidney beans and 1 can of chick peas.
2. Dice the large onion.
3. Add garlic cloves to taste.
4. Combine all ingredients in a large casserole dish.
5. Bake at 400°F for 45 minutes.
6. Optionally, add 1/2-1 cup grated feta cheese during the last ten minutes of cooking.
7. Serve over couscous or another grain of your choice.
Note: For future batches, consider draining the tomatoes and reserving the liquid, adding it until the dish looks right.
